Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: nuvola fonte-acquedotto visualizzata solo in parte

Corregge due bug indipendenti che causavano la visualizzazione parziale:

1. tightBoundingBox gonfiato: PotreeConverter 2.x crea sempre un cubo
   cubico (59.8x59.8x59.8m) anche se i dati reali sono 59.8x46x17m.
   OctreeLoader copiava questo cubo in tightBoundingBox, causando
   fitToScreen() a posizionare la camera a ~104m puntando a Z=30m
   invece che al centro reale dei dati (~8.4m). Fix: dopo il caricamento
   si sovrascrive tightBoundingBox/tightBoundingSphere con i bounds reali
   letti dall'attributo "position" del metadata.json.

2. Point budget aumentato da 2M a 5M (dati: 3.06M punti totali).

commit.message:
wait_for_loginを完全書き直し + デバッグログ強化

- 関数をシンプルな3ステップ構成に整理:
  Step1: LOGIN_URLにアクセス
  Step2: ページ状態を判定（ダッシュボード/creator.line.me/ログインページ）
  Step3: ポーリング待機
- タイムアウトを180秒→300秒に延長
- ポーリング中に30秒ごとに全ページURLをログ出力
- ブラウザ起動各ステップにステータス出力を追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Feature 08 — Community & Growth Service

Backend (crates/community_service, port 3011):
- 35 REST endpoints covering all 4 feature groups
- hub_service: community hubs, events (timezone-aware), forum threads/posts
- mentorship: mentor profiles, pairs, sessions (with ratings), cohorts
- career: milestones (XP system), skill gaps, learning paths with progress
- wellbeing: daily check-ins, rolling 7-day burnout risk scoring (low/medium/high/critical)
- carbon: offset logging, aggregate footprint (DOUBLE PRECISION, no decimal dep)
- 6 new Kafka events on community.events topic

Database (migrations/0014):
- 17 new tables: community_hubs, hub_memberships, community_events,
  event_attendees, forum_threads, forum_posts, mentor_profiles,
  mentorship_pairs, mentorship_sessions, cohort_groups, cohort_members,
  career_profiles, career_milestones, learning_paths, skill_gaps,
  wellbeing_checkins, burnout_signals, carbon_offsets, carbon_footprints
- Full-text search index on forum_threads

Infrastructure:
- Cargo.toml: community_service added to workspace members
- docker-compose.yml: community-service at port 3011
- crates/common/src/events.rs: 6 new event structs + TOPIC_COMMUNITY_EVENTS
- apps/web/next.config.ts: /api/community/* → localhost:3011 proxy rewrite

Frontend (Next.js 15, Zinc dark / Amber accents):
- 4 pages: /community, /mentorship, /career, /wellbeing
- 7 components: CommunityHubCard, MentorCard, CareerProgressBar,
  SkillGapChart, BurnoutMeter, WellbeingCheckin, CarbonBadge
- api.ts: 20 new typed community service functions

commit.message:
feat: specialty audit/fix section in db_audit.html (#134)

* fix: split multi-number phone fields into individual tap-to-call entries

locPhones() splits phone/fax fields on '/' or ',' and renders each
number as its own row with its own tel: link — one tap per number.
Applies to both phone and fax fields in location detail views.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: split multi-number phone fields + db_audit phone cleanup tool

- locPhones() in nav.js: any phone/fax field with / or , separators
  renders each number as its own tap-to-call row (display fix, live now)
- db_audit.html: new section finds all multi-number phone/fax entries,
  Fix All button splits first number → phone, second → fax (or notes
  if fax already occupied)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: upcoming tasks use gray bar in Tasks view to match History view

Tasks tab was showing yellow (#f59e0b) left bar for upcoming reminders
while History tab showed gray (#6b7280) for the same items. Both now
consistently use gray for upcoming, red for overdue, green for completed.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* feat: dedicated activity search by name, practice, city, notes

Adds a search bar directly in the History/Activity/Tasks view that
searches ONLY contact_logs — completely independent of the global
sidebar search. Covers: provider name, practice name, location city,
address, label, note text, author, date.

- _activitySearchTerm state variable persists across tab switches
- activitySearch() re-renders whichever activity sub-tab is active
- Clears automatically when navigating away from activity section
- × button to clear search inline

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* fix: clear CSV paste textarea immediately after import starts

Prevents stale CSV text from being accidentally re-imported or
corrupting a subsequent paste.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

* feat: add specialty audit/fix section to db_audit.html

New section shows every provider with a specialty value outside the 5
valid options (Podiatry, Wound Care, Dermatology, Other, Administrative
Staff). Groups providers by bad value with count + examples, per-group
remap dropdown, individual Fix button, and Fix All Mapped batch action.

Handles NULL/blank specialty (remaps both null and empty string).
Bad specialty count added to stats grid and total issues tally.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JSwf2nsNAamPn2q7jLngNb

v1.12.0: Deep tone-of-voice rewrite from Maor voice analysis

Rewrote tone-of-voice.md as 11-part deep reference grounded in
Maor's actual LinkedIn/X posting behavior (58K + 14.7K followers).
Added content pillars (60/20/20), emotional range, platform voice
differences, post anatomy templates, before/after examples, and
The Five Tests quality gate. Updated shared-instructions with
content pillar constraints, emotional restraint rule, and signature
patterns. Added voice guidance to LP creation skill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ATTAINS cold-start optimization: per-state blob persistence and lazy loading

Split monolithic ATTAINS blob (2-3MB) into per-state files (~40-100KB each) with
a lightweight meta blob (~200 bytes). Components that only need one state now
download ~97% less data on cold Vercel instances.

- Add per-state blob save/load (cache/attains/{STATE}.json + _meta.json)
- Add ensureMetaWarmed(), ensureStateLoaded(), getAttainsStateData() for lazy per-state loading
- New attains-state-data API action: ?action=attains-state-data&state=MD
- Switch K12/MS4/NGO/State/University components to per-state endpoint
- Switch StateReportCard to attains-national-summary (counts only, ~5KB)
- Make buildStateAssessmentData async with per-state loading
- Keep monolithic blob + ensureWarmed() for backward compat with national endpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: login form broken due to async function in onsubmit handler

The decrypt() and check() functions are async, but the form used
onsubmit="return fn()" which receives a Promise (truthy) instead
of false, causing the form to submit as GET and reload the page.

Fixed by using event.preventDefault() before calling the async function.
Regenerated encrypted report with working login.

commit.message:
fix(e2e): fix all failing and skipping e2e tests, auto-reseed on startup (#110)

* fix(e2e): fix all failing and skipping e2e tests, auto-reseed on startup

- Fix CEO dashboard: subtitle locator ambiguity (3 matches), remove
  nonexistent Refresh button test, fix model health card timing with
  .or() pattern and toBeAttached()
- Fix underwriter detail: strict mode on "Re-run" button (.first())
- Fix chat panel: strict mode on "Message to be cleared" (.first() +
  toHaveCount(0))
- Fix borrower dashboard-cards: replace one-shot isVisible() with
  auto-retrying toBeVisible() for async data
- Fix borrower conditions: remove skip guard, wait for Respond button
- Fix borrower disclosures: remove skip guards (re-seed ensures clean)
- Fix borrower document-upload: scope locator to Documents card
- Fix LO detail: replace skip with proper wait for document rows
- Fix LO pipeline / UW queue: replace skips with hard assertions
- Delete stale placeholders/coming-soon.spec.ts (CEO is implemented)
- Add OPEN condition to Sarah Mitchell seed fixtures
- Add auto-seed on API startup with config hash change detection
- Improve compute_config_hash to hash full fixture content
- Allow main.py in HMDA isolation check (delegates to seeder service)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): cancel agent graph on WebSocket disconnect

Race the agent task against a disconnect sentinel using
asyncio.wait(FIRST_COMPLETED). When the client disconnects mid-stream,
the agent task is cancelled immediately -- freeing the LLM slot and
preventing orphaned requests from blocking concurrent connections.

Also fixes remaining e2e test flakiness: datetime import bug in seed
fixtures, stepper/loan-amount strict mode violations, chat panel
waitFor timing, and underwriter detail navigation timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(api): update seed idempotency test to use real config hash

The test used a hardcoded hash that no longer matches after
compute_config_hash was changed to hash full fixture content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: parallel CSV import with batched row processing

Process import rows in concurrent batches of 5 instead of sequentially.
Also hoists auth.getUser() out of the per-row loop so it runs once
per import rather than once per movie. Expected speedup is ~5x for
large imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ログイン待機の点滅バグを根本修正 + 残留プロセス対策

【点滅の原因】
ログインページURL (access.line.me/...?redirect_uri=...creator.line.me...)
のクエリパラメータにcreator.line.meが含まれるため、
「creator.line.meにいる」と誤判定してpage.goto()を毎回実行していた。

【修正内容】
- ポーリングループからpage.goto()を完全に排除
- URLの変化だけを監視するシンプルな方式に変更
- ブラウザ起動前に残留Chromiumプロセスを強制終了

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Split flappy-unicorn into focused JS modules

Extracted 730 lines of inline JS from index.html into 6 small files:
- constants.js  (~20 lines) — canvas, physics constants, color palettes
- audio.js      (~55 lines) — Web Audio API sound effects
- state.js      (~25 lines) — mutable game state variables
- game.js       (~110 lines) — init, input, spawning, collision
- draw.js       (~260 lines) — all canvas draw functions
- loop.js       (~80 lines) — update logic and main game loop

index.html is now an 89-line HTML/CSS shell.
Each file can now be edited independently without token issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove wsl2-fix-path.md — fix is committed and no longer needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix photo picker — switch from PHAsset to local file storage

PhotosPicker's itemIdentifier isn't a PHAsset localIdentifier,
so PHAsset.fetchAssets found nothing and images never loaded.

Now uses loadTransferable to get raw image data, saves as JPEG
to Documents/photos/, and references by filename. Removes Photos
framework dependency entirely — the privacy-preserving picker
handles access itself. No NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription needed.

fix: ember steps fill full page height, content 20% from top

Outer wrapper uses minHeight:100% so EmberOverlay and glow cover

to push content down from the top. NameCharacter uses justify-center

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix recovery path: don't short-circuit when metadata is missing

When power dies between finalize_output and save_metadata, the old
recovery path cleaned up the checkpoint and returned True (skip).
But the dispatcher requires BOTH CSV + metadata to exist. Result:
dispatcher re-queued → next run archived the good CSV → full re-run.

Fix: return False (proceed) without cleaning up intermediates.
The normal flow resumes with all draws already in checkpoint,
for-loop skips everything, finalize harmlessly re-writes CSV,
and save_metadata finally writes the missing sidecar.

feat: add caller-scoped actor override and thread-safe timer operations

Adds explicit actor parameter to MCP timer/workflow tools so callers can
override the transport default. Wraps multi-step write operations in a
serialized lock to prevent interleaved SQLite writes from concurrent MCP
calls. Enables WAL mode for concurrent read/write support. Adds retry-safe
actual_time propagation in complete_node/submit_for_review.

fix: restore hard-coded thread pool size limit of 16 (#48128)

## Summary
- Restore the hard-coded maximum of 16 threads for the C++ IO thread
pool
- In large file scenarios, CGo threads can consume all available thread
resources, starving Go goroutines
- This reverts commit ffd3435c4f and the related test changes from
a41d170c14

issue: https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/issues/48060

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify thread pool size is clamped to 16 via C++ unit test
(`ThreadPoolTest.ResizeAboveMaximum`)
- [ ] Test large file load scenarios to confirm Go goroutines are no
longer starved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Signed-off-by: sijie-ni-0214 <sijie.ni@zilliz.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: run_bootstrap_evaluation returns bool, not None on skip

When _check_existing_and_handle finds matching output and skips,
the bare `return` yielded None. main() then did sys.exit(0 if None else 1)
→ exit code 1 → dispatcher re-queued completed jobs in an infinite loop.

Fix: return True on skip, change annotation -> bool.

Dispatcher: B=30, 5reg+5cls, output verification, re-queue on failure

- Changed --n-bootstrap 50 to --n-bootstrap 30 --n-reg 5 --n-cls 5
- Job completion now requires BOTH CSV and metadata sidecar (not just CSV)
- cleanup_finished() verifies output; re-queues jobs with missing files
- Failed jobs are retried up to MAX_RETRIES=3 times, then logged
- Re-queued jobs get priority over new jobs in the launch loop
- Status line shows metadata count and requeue depth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Strike Recorder: For Cause/Excused only; sync to Scale Mode

- Removed State Strike and Defense Strike from Strike Recorder; only For Cause and Excused remain
- Scale Mode now reads strikes-{caseId} from localStorage on load and pre-populates struckJurors, so jurors marked in Strike Recorder are hidden from Scale Mode scoring grid automatically

repository.description: Jury Response Recorder

commit.message:
feat: auto-populate Now Playing + Clear Library

Auto-populate Now Playing:
- Adding a movie fills the next open Now Playing slot (up to 3)
- Importing via CSV fills open slots with a random pick from imported batch
- Existing Now Playing state is never overwritten

Clear Library:
- New Danger Zone section in Settings with two-step confirmation
- Shows movie count before confirming; deletes all movies, movie_labels,
  and clears Now Playing for the current user

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: monitorar-ads puxa dados automaticamente da Meta API

- Substitui leitura de log-ads-{cliente}.json por Meta Marketing API v21
- Busca insights (spend, impressões, alcance, CTR, CPM, frequência, leads/CPL)
- Lista campanhas e status em tempo real
- Posta comentário na task ClickUp (dispatcher) ou cria task de alerta (cron)
- VPS: META_ADS_TOKEN e META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID adicionados ao .env

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README.md with project documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Discord membership check + custom API domain (api.clipapp.uk)

- Add Discord user ID tracking through OAuth callback
- Pass discordUserId to worker on register/subscribe for DB storage
- Migrate worker API URLs from workers.dev to api.clipapp.uk (fixes access for foreign users)
- Update CSP connect-src to allow new domain
